overview: A professional multi-page website for a private equity firm, featuring a brand portfolio showcase, board of directors, about us, contact form, and jobs listing. Designed to present 10 portfolio companies with logos and descriptions in a clean, corporate aesthetic.
features: Multi-page navigation with Home, Portfolio, Board, About, Contact, and Jobs
Brand portfolio grid showcasing 10 companies with logo and description upload
Board of Directors directory with headshots and bios
Job listings page with positions and application form
